hero.subtitle: Amparo is a movement that connects women in vulnerable situations to support centers, volunteers, resources, and hope — across Brazil.
hero.stat1Label: victims of sexual violence per year in Brazil
hero.stat3Label: is the day to change this story

dados.body: Behind the numbers, there are faces. Women, teenagers, and girls who reach the most difficult moment of their lives without finding care. The debate exists — but the support network doesn't.
dados.card1Text: registered rape victims in Brazil in 2024 — the highest number ever recorded. One person every 6 minutes.
dados.card2Text: of victims are children and adolescents under 14 — girls who need protection, not silence.
dados.card3Text: births per year are the result of sexual violence against girls under 14. Children bearing children.
dados.card4Text: hospitalizations per year in public health related to abortion complications — many due to lack of support and alternatives.
dados.card5Text: legal abortions performed per year in Brazil — a negligible number compared to 19,000 girls under 14 who become mothers annually.
dados.card6Text: of women who experience pregnancy loss develop depression. The absence of care deepens the suffering.
dados.source: Sources: Brazilian Public Safety Yearbook 2025, DataSUS, UNICEF, IPEA, Agência Brasil

missao.body: Amparo is born from the conviction that faith without works is empty. We want to build a real support network in Brazil — with physical centers, prepared volunteers, practical resources, and human presence where it matters most.
missao.quoteText: Religion that is pure and undefiled before God the Father is this: to visit orphans and widows in their affliction.
missao.card1Text: Psychological and spiritual support for women in moments of crisis — with qualified listening, respect, and human presence.
missao.card2Text: Connecting support centers, volunteers, doctors, and legal assistance nationwide, so no woman is left without knowing where to find help.
missao.card3Text: Real alternatives: legal adoption, temporary housing, host families, professional training, and income generation.

ajudar.titleNormal: There is a place for you
ajudar.body: In the US, there are over 2,500 crisis pregnancy support centers. In Brazil, fewer than 20. We need to change this — and we need you.
ajudar.card1Text: Psychologists, lawyers, doctors, educators, social workers — your skill can change someone's story. Qualified listening at the right moment saves lives.
ajudar.card2Text: This network's infrastructure needs technology, communication, team training, and national expansion. Every investment reaches a life.
ajudar.card3Text: Have a church, space, or organization? Help open a support point in your city with our network's backing.
ajudar.card3Link: I want to open a center →

form.body: We are gathering the first people who will build this network with us. Leave your contact and let's talk.
form.fieldRole: How do you want to help?
form.fieldMessage: Tell us a bit about yourself (optional)
form.placeMessage: What motivated you to get interested in this project?
form.submitBtn: I want to be part of Amparo
form.note: Your data is only used for project-related contact. No spam, with respect.
form.alertError: Please fill out your name, email, and how you want to help.
form.successText: We have received your sign up. We will contact you soon to discuss how you can be part of this movement.
